title: alopecurus arundinaceus subsp. armenus
intro: Alopecurus arundinaceus subsp. armenus, also known as Armemian Foxtail Brome, is a subspecies of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory problems. Alopecurus arundinaceus subsp. armenus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
